hmong.search_by_name_meaning_clade_or_place: Tshawb nrhiav los ntawm lub npe, lub ntsiab, clade, los yog qhov chaw...
hmong.first_life_simple_microbes: Thawj txoj sia — cov microbes yooj yim
hmong.microbes_fill_the_air_with_oxygen: Microbes ua kom cua puv oxygen
hmong.cambrian_explosion_animals_diversify: Cambrian explosion — cov tsiaj huam vam
hmong.plants_spread_onto_land: Cov nroj tsuag nthuav mus rau av
hmong.first_four_legged_animals_walk_on_land: Thawj cov tsiaj plaub txhais ceg taug kev saum av
hmong.the_great_dying_end_permian_extinction: Lub Great Dying (kev ploj tuag thaum kawg Permian)
hmong.asteroid_non_bird_dinosaurs_end: Asteroid — kawg ntawm cov dinosaurs uas tsis yog noog
hmong.first_human_ancestors_hominins: Thawj cov pog koob yawg koob tib neeg (hominins)
hmong.map_of_where_dinosaur_fossils_are_foun: Daim ntawv qhia qhov chaw uas pom dinosaur fossils niaj hnub no, raws li continent
hmong.theropod_mostly_meat_eaters_two_legs: Theropod (feem ntau noj nqaij, ob txhais ceg)
hmong.ornithischian_bird_hipped_plant_eaters: Ornithischian (noj nroj uas muaj noog duav)
hmong.dozens_of_dinosaurs_are_preserved_with: Ntau caum tus dinosaurs raug khaws cia nrog plaub noog, txij li cov plaub yooj yim mus rau cov plaub ya tiag. Ntau tus muaj plaub noog ntev ua ntej ib tug twg ntawm lawv ya tau.
hmong.birds_have_a_furcula_or_wishbone_so_di: Cov noog muaj ib lub furcula, los yog wishbone. Cov theropod dinosaurs xws li T. rex thiab Velociraptor kuj muaj. Nws yog tib lub pob txha tib yam.
hmong.hollow_air_filled_bones: Cov pob txha qhuav puv cua
hmong.bird_bones_are_light_and_filled_with_a: Cov pob txha noog sib thiab puv nrog cov hnab cua. Tib cov pob txha puv cua tshwm sim hauv ntau cov dinosaurs, ib feem ntawm lub cev ua pa zoo li noog.
hmong.three_toed_feet: Ko taw peb tus ntiv taw
hmong.the_classic_bird_footprint_three_toes_: Cov hneev taw noog classic, peb tus ntiv taw rau pem hauv ntej, phim cov ko taw theropod. Cov hneev taw fossil dinosaur zoo li cov hneev taw noog loj heev.
hmong.dinosaurs_laid_eggs_in_nests_and_some_: Cov dinosaurs nteg qe rau hauv zes thiab qee tus, xws li Citipati thiab Oviraptor, zaum saum lawv los puag lawv cov me nyuam, zoo tib yam li cov noog ua.
hmong.a_wrist_that_folds: Ib txhais dab teg uas tais tau
hmong.birds_fold_their_wings_using_a_special: Cov noog tais lawv cov tis siv ib lub pob txha dab teg tshwj xeeb uas zoo li hli nrho. Tib lub pob txha tso cai rau qee cov dinosaurs rub lawv cov caj npab los rau lub cev.
hmong.fast_growth_warm_bodies: Loj hlob ceev, lub cev sov
hmong.growth_rings_in_dinosaur_bones_show_ma: Cov growth rings hauv cov pob txha dinosaur qhia tias ntau tus loj hlob sai thiab muaj cev sov, zoo li cov noog thiab mammals ntau dua cov reptiles niaj hnub no.
